seoDescription: Get in touch with Gamma Capital. We're here to help with your investment questions and consulting needs.
heroDescription: Have questions about our services or ready to get started? We'd love to hear from you.
introDescription: Whether you're looking for investment advice, interested in our memberships, or have general questions, our team is here to help.
formDescription: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
formSuccessMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your message and respond shortly.
formErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your investment goals or questions...
expectationsHeading: What to Expect After Contacting Us

expectationItems.title: Quick Response
expectationItems.description: We respond to all inquiries within 24 business hours

expectationItems.title: Personal Attention
expectationItems.description: A member of our team will personally review your request

expectationItems.title: Confidential
expectationItems.description: Your information is kept strictly confidential

disclaimer: Gamma Capital does not provide personalized investment advice through this form. Any consultation is for informational purposes only.
